title: Quick Start
body:
# Quick Start

Get a working example in under 5 minutes.

## 1. Create a new project

```bash
npx sigil create my-project --template docs
cd my-project
```

## 2. Configure the database

```bash
cp .env.example .env
# Edit .env with your PostgreSQL credentials
```

## 3. Run migrations

```bash
sigil migrate
```

## 4. Start the server

```bash
sigil dev
```

## 5. Open the admin panel

Visit `http://localhost:3000/admin` to manage your documentation content.

## Next Steps

- Add new doc pages via the admin panel or by creating JSON files in `content/`
- Customize the sidebar in `sigil.config.ts`
- See the [API Reference](/docs/api-reference/overview) for programmatic access
